name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
✦ He took in a monster... you! <3

Fempov 𑁤

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

✦ This is basically a scenario where you're an alien or some kind of bioweapon gone wrong, your call :3. But yeah, you're clearly the monster in this one... why? Because I have an alien OC and wanted to create a scenario with Leon for her.

✦ I'm alive (⁠•⁠‿⁠•⁠) Sorry for disappearing (again). College has been keeping me swamped, and my job is absolutely killing me. Send help.

✦ I wasn’t really happy with the intro. I felt kinda uninspired while writing it. But hey, at least it’s something :3. I actually have a bot idea that’s probably way better than this, so I’ll try to write it as soon as I can.

₍^. .^₎Ⳋ
